nasb.text: The Lord appeared to him and said, “Do not go down to Egypt; stay in the land of which I shall tell you.

esv.text: And the Lord appeared to him and said, “Do not go down to Egypt; dwell in the land of which I shall tell you.

cnv.text: 耶和華向以撒顯現，說：“你不要下到埃及去，要住在我所指示你的地方。

ccb.text: 耶和华向以撒显现说：“不要下埃及去，要住在我指示你住的地方。

csbs.text: 耶和华向以撒显现，说：“你不要继续下埃及去，要住在我指示你的地方。
